narrative.summary: Transportive 60s cocktail-bar homage with standout lighting; drinks deliver beyond the gimmick.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I love that they have tiny tables on the corridor so people waiting for a table can get started on a drink.

The caviar fish filet sandwich was delicious. If you like the filet o fish at McDonald’s, here’s a great bougie version.

The ambience was a bit noisy and hard to have any conversation. Everyone was just shouting at each other. But it’s a lively bar and I guess par for the course.

Very cute decor - I love the little mushroom lamps on the bar."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "We had a magical experience at this unique asian-inspired cocktail bar! The strachiatella toast was definitely my favourite — the sourdough was the perfect vessel for the chili oil, soy bean, dill dip. The caviar fish filet was also perfect — reminded me of a high-end filet-o-fish!

Service was great and very attentive. The atmosphere is super retro and vibey. It’s a perfect cozy spot for a date!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Have you ever tried a durian cocktail? Lonely Diner did the unthinkable and made the world’s most controversial fruit… fun. Their Forbidden Fruit is a clarified milk punch. It's velvety, light, with just a "hint" of durian custardy funk. Clean, smooth, and way too easy to drink 😂.

Cocktail highlights:

• Gochu On My Mind: boozy, layered, spirit-forward. Definitely not for anyone who avoids a strong pour, but every sip evolves. It's bold and silky with a slow-building gochugaru heat. A spicy, umami mashup of Old Fashioned + Manhattan (i think).

• Revitalizer: first sip hits with galangal, then comes the lift of lemongrass before it settles into a hint of eucalyptus finish that lingers long after. It’s light yet complex, crisp yet grounding.

• Bohemian Raspberry: tart, creamy, and cheeky all at once.

We also went full send on the entire snack menu and here are the highlights:

• Caviar Fish Filet: tangy, creamy, crispy. Definitely a fan favorite

• Betel Leaf Beef Sliders: my favorite! First bite and my eyes did the full 🤩

• Shrimp Nori Bites
• Sesame Baby Corn

Lonely Diner is full of surprises. The drinks taste like a science experiment gone VERY right. With a lineup of talent from BarChef, After Seven, Big Trouble and Midnight Market, the bar was already set high, and they more than delivered. 10/10 would come back."
